_doc: S&P 100 (OEX) constituents — the curated screener universe. Every ticker here is pre-analyzed nightly so the screener returns instant results. Researched-but-not-listed tickers live on the Research page only and do not appear in the screener. List is a static snapshot; review and update periodically (S&P revises constituents a few times per year). Last reviewed: 2026-05.
